chainstack_testnet.name: Chainstack Testnet
chainstack_testnet.description: Chainstack testnet API - 25 RPS free plan. DEMOTED to last-resort backup (priority 50): on the current free plan it 403s on v2 getTransactions, 429s on general reads, and 500s on sendBoc/broadcast, yet passes the getMasterchainInfo health probe - so as priority-1 it was selected 'best' for ALL methods (incl. broadcast/reads, which the getTransactions capability flag does NOT divert) and broke moves. TON Center / Tatum now serve the workload; this stays only as a get-method fallback.

toncenter_testnet.name: TON Center Testnet
toncenter_testnet.description: Official TON Center testnet - 10 RPS with API key, 1 RPS without. PROMOTED to primary (priority 1): serves the full v2 surface (getTransactions/sendBoc/get-methods, curl-proven 200) so every method - reads AND broadcast - prefers it over chainstack.

toncenter_mainnet.name: TON Center Mainnet
toncenter_mainnet.description: Official TON Center mainnet - 10 RPS with API key, 1 RPS without

quicknode_mainnet.name: QuickNode Mainnet
quicknode_mainnet.description: QuickNode mainnet - 15 RPS free plan. Endpoint automatically appends /jsonRPC for JSON-RPC requests.

getblock_mainnet.name: GetBlock Mainnet
getblock_mainnet.description: GetBlock mainnet API - 20 RPS. Endpoint automatically appends /jsonRPC for JSON-RPC requests.

onfinality_testnet.name: OnFinality Testnet
onfinality_testnet.description: OnFinality testnet - 4 RPS free tier. Uses /rpc endpoint with API key in query parameter (?apikey=KEY). If no API key is set, falls back to /public endpoint (rate-limited). OnFinality requires API key in query params, NOT headers.

tatum_testnet.name: Tatum Testnet
tatum_testnet.description: Tatum testnet gateway - 3 RPS free plan. PROMOTED to secondary (priority 2): serves the full workload (getTransactions/sendBoc 200) so it backs up TON Center ahead of the demoted chainstack. Endpoint automatically appends /jsonRPC. Requires x-api-key header with TATUM_API_KEY_TESTNET. Not compatible with browser due to CORS restrictions.

tatum_mainnet.name: Tatum Mainnet
tatum_mainnet.description: Tatum mainnet gateway - 3 RPS free plan. Endpoint automatically appends /jsonRPC. Requires x-api-key header with TATUM_API_KEY_MAINNET. Not compatible with browser due to CORS restrictions.

orbs_testnet.name: Orbs TON Access Testnet
orbs_testnet.description: Orbs decentralized gateway - no hard limit, uses dynamic discovery. Liteserver proxy serves get-methods/state but 403s on v2 getTransactions - excluded from the getTransactions candidate set.

orbs_mainnet.name: Orbs TON Access Mainnet
orbs_mainnet.description: Orbs decentralized gateway - no hard limit, uses dynamic discovery. Liteserver proxy serves get-methods/state but 403s on v2 getTransactions - excluded from the getTransactions candidate set.
